stub.note: Stub 1.0/2.0 scenario retired; frontend works with backend calculation values affected by irrigation input.

fixes: Vite dev proxy routes same-origin /api/* to the local backend from Docker without changing VITE_API_BASE_URL.
Approval payload strips backend-only managedScope.scopeHash before POST.
Active irrigation layer is hydrated from backend projection and no longer treated as localStorage-approved state.
BASE_CALCULATION_RUN_IS_NOT_CURRENT_APPLIED refreshes current-context while preserving the draft.
notChecked: No npm test script exists in package.json.
